history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark-themed game UI screen shows a “LEVEL UP!” banner above a user progress panel with level and experience stats.

Main Subject:
The central visual focus is a rectangular, rounded-corner panel displaying a profile section and multiple progress indicators, including a large circular avatar placeholder on the left and level/experience and other numeric stats on the right.

Setting:
This appears to be a digital user interface screen on a dark background with a purple-and-navy color scheme and a faint, gradient glow. No physical environment is shown.

Visual Details:
At the very top center, the text “LEVEL UP!” appears in bright yellow with small decorative diamond-like marks on either side. Below it, a large rounded rectangle panel spans most of the width, with a subtle border and darker interior. On the left side inside the panel, a circular avatar area contains two light gray oval shapes stacked vertically on a light gray background, outlined by a purple ring. Near the upper middle, a username “qilaa” appears in white text, with a small yellow circular badge to the right containing “#21”. Under the username, the label “LEVEL PROGRESS” appears in smaller light text.
In the main stats row, there is a purple rounded rectangle labeled “LEVEL” with a large white “10” inside. Next to it, a dark green rounded rectangle labeled “EXPERIENCE” shows “14 / 550” in bright text. Below that, a horizontal progress bar sits across the center, with a small purple fill segment on the left and “2%” shown at the far right. Further down, there are three smaller rounded rectangles containing “MESSAGES” with “859” beneath, “XP NEEDED” with “536” beneath, and “NEXT LVL” with “11” beneath. At the bottom of the panel, faint gray text reads “Congratulations on leveling up!” The camera view is straight-on, centered, and framed like a screen capture or UI mockup.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
qilaa
#21
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
10
EXPERIENCE
14 / 550
2%
MESSAGES
859
XP NEEDED
536
NEXT LVL
11
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image displays a “LEVEL UP!” user interface showing a profile name and progress toward a new game level. It includes level number, experience current and total, a progress bar with a percentage, and counts for messages, XP needed, and the next level.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

LEVEL UP!

qilaa  
#21

LEVEL PROGRESS

LEVEL 10

EXPERIENCE  
14 / 550

2%

MESSAGES  
859

XP NEEDED  
536

NEXT LVL  
11

Congratulations on leveling up!

# Structured Version

## Level Up
- **Title:** LEVEL UP!
- **User:** qilaa  
- **Badge/ID:** **#21**

## Level Progress
- **Level:** 10
- **Experience:** 14 / 550
- **Progress:** 2%

## Stats
- **Messages:** 859
- **XP Needed:** 536
- **Next Level:** 11

## Message
- Congratulations on leveling up!

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
Gambar ini menampilkan sebuah profil pengguna yang bernama "qilaa" dengan nomor #21. Terdapat tulisan "LEVEL UP!" di bagian atas, menandakan pencapaian level baru. Di bawah nama pengguna, terlihat informasi "LEVEL PROGRESS". Pengguna tersebut berada di "LEVEL 10" dan memiliki "EXPERIENCE 14 / 550". Terdapat juga indikator progres yang menunjukkan 2% penyelesaian menuju level berikutnya. Di bagian bawah, tertera "MESSAGES 859", "XP NEEDED 536", dan "NEXT LVL 11". Teks di paling bawah menyatakan "Congratulations on leveling up!". Secara keseluruhan, gambar ini adalah tampilan antarmuka pengguna yang menunjukkan pencapaian level dalam sebuah sistem, dan tidak mengandung konten NSFW.
